reviews.text:
Outstanding Professional Litigation Support

I called Core Litigation Support to set up a deposition as a self-represented litigant, and the experience was excellent from start to finish. The staff was professional, respectful, and extremely knowledgeable. They answered all of my calls, explained exactly how the process works, and made everything clear and easy.

Their services are top-tier video, audio, and certified transcripts and they operate in a truly neutral and professional environment. What stood out most is that they welcome everyone, regardless of who you are or whether you are represented by an attorney. You are treated with respect and professionalism across the board.

This is a highly qualified, well-run litigation support company that understands the court process and supports fairness and transparency.

I give this place a 100-star rating ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Highly recommended.

Hassan Aoun

reviews.text: Attorney Lester helped me with a personal injury incident.  She was very responsive via phone and email. I never felt out of the loop. Because of this attorney my grandmother wis forced to be buried with her husband’s last name. Between her and the judge the process of divorce took over 2 and a half years. She required constant handholding and check ups to get things done. Her communication was terrible and her lack of empathy for my grandmother will never be forgotten. I pray that no one ever has to go through what we did. We would NOT recommend her.

Loren worked quickly and strategically to bring the matter to a full resolution, and he did so with compassion, sharp legal insight, and total command of the process. In May 2024, while driving around 45 miles an hour, my vehicle was rear-ended by a vehicle traveling approximately 60 mph. As a result, I was thrown back with such force that my seat back was broken, and I was in more of a horizontal position. Shortly after the accident, I started noticing a strange smell in my house. In actuality, it was not the house that I was smelling, it was an odor that I thought I could detect.  After visiting my ENT doctor and having gone through several tests, It was determined that my olfactory nerves had been damaged, causing me to have this recurring phantom smell while at the same time, masking other odors around me. At this time, it is not life-threatening as much as it is life altering.
Brett Altman and his team lead me through the process of being compensated for the damage to my olfactory nerves and how this has changed my life and will continue to do so. They corresponded and followed up with my doctors. They made suggestions and encouraged me to keep on going. They were kind, understanding, and caring while at the same time very efficient and serious about their work.  Brett worked to get the best settlement and I was not disappointed.

Our world was turned upside down due to a denied homeowners insurance claim. We had no idea where to go or what to do. After speaking with Mrs Annie Marie Earls one time, she was the first person to give us hope and direction. To make all this even harder it was at the peak of Covid-19’s shut down of the whole state. Mrs Earls was very attentive in understanding our situation and compassionate about our loss, not having a legal background ourselves. Mrs Earls was able to explain the process in words we could understand. She was very open and transparent in all steps and extremely committed to our best interest. Due to Mrs Earls tireless work, ease to contact and willing to take the time to ensure we were aware and comfortable in the process. We highly recommend her services. Mrs Annie Marie Earls made us feel better throughout this difficult situation and supported us every step of the way. Hopefully we are never in this situation again, but if we were Mrs Earls is the first person we would call. We can not thank her enough.

We had a major fire loss December 23, 2019. Our insurance was initially helpful in covering funds for immediate housing and a small amount of cash for personal needs. Things went down hill quickly and by mid January we knew we were in an adversarial situation. We began to look for an appropriate law firm experienced in situations like ours. Our first contact with Melamed, Levitt, Milanowski & Earls was a lengthy phone conversation with Annie Earls. She listened, asked pertinent questions, helped define the battle we were in, and provided assurance our fight was winnable. We interviewed two law firms and are very pleased we choose Ms. Earls.
We were not able to start rebuilding until August 2020. We moved back in in February of this year. Our fight included Examinations Under Oath and multiple court filings. Annie helped lead us the whole way. The experience was long, frustrating, and difficult. The financial and other personal information the insurance company required seemed endless. We received our final payment from the insurance company the middle of November 2021. Annie was with us the whole way and was instrumental in our ability to reach an adequate settlement.

Attorney Annie & Her Firm were very much experienced and professional handling our case. She was there for us every time we tried to reach her and her services were very much satisfied. We wish the firm the best of luck in the future and we will always recommend MLMF to our friends and family!

reviews.text:
Our 103 year old mother was a passenger in an automobile accident in September 2023. When I spoke to Alan Blatnikoff, partner at Mindell Law, explained her injuries and shared that she was no longer driving or insured (the new Michigan No Fault law considers her uninsured), Alan gently and kindly said he would be happy to take her case. We were so grateful as other firms had chosen not to represent her. There was a good chance that Alan's work would be gratis as our mom is one very hearty and healthy woman, even now at 104. She was experiencing pain and was quite bruised, however she did not have any broken bones, head or other serious long term debilitating injuries.

So, that's the history, now let's talk about the service. Alan got to work immediately, notifying the insurance company of his representation and working with Kisha Troupe, our wonderful Senior Case Manager from Feinberg Consulting. Over the next 8 months, Alan would keep close tabs on our mother's case, contact us and skillfully advise on all issues related to our mother's care and insurance concerns. This was always done with thoughtfulness and kindness.

As medical coverage from the insurance company came to a close, we were quite surprised when Alan informed us that he had begun negotiations with the company for a cash settlement. The settlement was very fair and again totally unexpected! When we went to meet Alan to pick up the check, only then did he share that he knew us from shared experiences at a summer camp.

As a family, we can assure you that choosing Mindell Law to represent you in an injury claim is the best choice you will make. Honest, kind, skilled, thorough and hard working, those are but a few of the words we use to describe Alan Blatnikoff and his law firm. Exemplary service is what you can expect with Mindell Law.

1/5/26. Just wanted to share that our mom is now, wait for it, 106, healthy and completely with it! Last year, she attended her first political rally and charmed all who met her, especially the children. A 5 year old was in awe to learn she was 100 years younger than the nice lady sitting in her walker. Our family is in awe as well at our continued fortune to enjoy our mom and want to thank Alan and his firm again for all the work they did over 2 years ago. A very Happy New Year!

My encounter with Mindell Law Firm was regrettably subpar. The firm's communication left much to be desired, with delays in updates and responses causing frustration and a sense of being left in the dark.

What compounded the disappointment was the abrupt termination of our professional relationship. Shockingly, Mindell Law Firm opted to notify me of their decision to drop my case via mail, devoid of any courtesy phone call. This impersonal approach added an extra layer of dissatisfaction to an already unsatisfactory experience.

Furthermore, the legal advice and representation provided did not meet my expectations, contributing to an overall lack of support during a crucial period. Given these shortcomings, I would advise potential clients to carefully weigh their options before engaging Mindell Law Firm's services.

reviews.text: I had a very disappointing experience with this law firm. I was referred to them by Sam Bernstein Law in regards to an injury. The first lawyer assigned to my case (Tyler) quit the firm as I was informed by the second attorney (Fadel) after several months of no communication. I felt that I did all the work necessary for Fadel  to suport my case such as providing a very detailed spreadsheet of medical expenses and a summary of the events leading to my injury. Several months later, I received a letter from Jeffrey Mindell telling me Fadel too was no longer with the firm and he was now representing me. Turns out Fadel had never formally ordered my medical records which resulted in another 90 delay after Mr. Mindell took over. In total, I spent about 15 months with this firm with limited interaction to learn they could not reach a settlement. Now I have 14 months to find another firm before my statute of limitations expires.  I cannot recommend their services and it has nothing to do with the case outcome.  That was disappointing but dealing with them was just frustrating.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mary, we are sorry you were disappointed.  I notice that 9 out of your 11 google reviews are 1 or 2 stars.  Unfortunately, we cannot control when staff leaves, but understand that was frustrating to you as it was to us. However, in June of this year, during a very long conversation, it was clearly explained why we made the decision we made to close your file which you understood.  Would love the opportunity to discuss this further.  Thank you.

Words can’t fully express how grateful my wife and I are for Aaron and the incredible work he did to help us through the immigration process. From the very first consultation, we knew we were in the hands of someone truly exceptional. Aaron took the time to carefully listen to our story, understand the unique details of our case, and walk us through the entire process with clarity, honesty, and an unmatched level of professionalism.

The green card process can be long, emotional, and at times overwhelming, but Aaron made us feel supported every step of the way. He was always accessible, whether it was answering late-night emails, preparing us for interviews, or explaining complicated legal language in ways we could understand. His attention to detail was incredible—nothing was overlooked, and every piece of documentation was meticulously reviewed.

What stood out the most was how deeply he cared—not just about the legal outcome, but about us as people. We never felt like just another case. Aaron’s compassion, patience, and dedication were truly above and beyond. He invested so much time and energy into making sure everything was perfect, and thanks to him, my wife is now a proud green card holder.

This experience has been life-changing for our family, and we owe so much of that to Aaron. If you are looking for an immigration lawyer who is not only brilliant at what he does but also deeply human in how he does it, Aaron is the one. We would recommend him a thousand times over.

Thank you, Aaron, for everything. You’ve made a lasting difference in our lives.

reviews.text:
I recently had to navigate a legal matter, and I’m incredibly grateful to the team at Advanta Law Firm for guiding me through it. From start to finish, they were professional, responsive, and genuinely had my best interests at heart.

A special thanks to Attorney Moe Zaher, who led my case with skill and compassion. He was sharp, approachable, and took the time to ensure I understood every step of the process. His guidance gave me real peace of mind during a stressful time—I always felt I was in capable hands.

I’d also like to thank his assistant, Ahmad, for his behind-the-scenes support. His efforts made a real difference and did not go unnoticed.

If you’re in need of strong, reliable legal representation from a team that truly cares, I wholeheartedly recommend Advanta Law Firm. They truly live up to their name.

I had a bankruptcy case so i went to Advanta law firm and met with Mr Steven and his assistant Ms Asala who worked with me thru all the procedure . Ms Asala has a beautiful face and a wonderful smile that makes you feel comfortable and rest assure that your case is under control. She is very professional . knows what she is doing she also keeps record of every step, keeps you posted and updated . answers your question and explains the situation in a simple easy way that makes you understand what's going on with your case. Other than that she is ready to help you all the time if something happens even after finishing the case .
Unless it's an injury lawsuit they're completely useless

I called Advanta hoping for help divorcing my Abusive husband.  Instead, I was treated poorly and hung up on by a receptionist who was very rude to me telling me no lawyer would take my case and no one could help me.  The tone of her voice was so angry.  I cried.  I am scared of my future getting divorced and ADVANTA made things WORSE. They claim to help women especially and they let this abused woman down.
Great customer service

Very friendly and professional, will recommend to anyone. Understanding and easy to talk to……. I recently visited another law firm before them and I was totally disappointed……. And now I’m glad I chose to go with them because if I had went with the other firm I probably would have lost my case. Even though I payed for the other consultation with the other firm it was worth paying again and going with these guys instead. Thank you guys!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Ms. Hicks, for your review. It was a pleasure to assist you. Please do not hesitate to reach out to us with any questions or concerns. We are happy to help!

Unfortunately, the reviewer is not our client. This law firm receives hundreds of calls each week. Sometimes people get upset when our office declines representation. Therefore, we are unable to respond since we do not have any record of this reviewer.

Unfortunately, the reviewer is not our client and if you look into the reviews placed by KMS Sigler, you will find that there are 10 establishments that received a 1 star review at the same day/time from this reviewer. We are one of them.

reviews.text: My attorney M. Zaher  is a beast (in the most professional way possible!) he took over my case from another attorney who is no longer with the firm. He got me results so fast and fought tooth and nail for my settlement! He got me more than what we originally went for and I am satisfied with the overall service I received. I recommend Attorney Zaher and Advanta Law if you want quick thorough results!
Complete lack of professionalism and decency.

She is the absolute worst attorney that you can hire! She has no ethic and she 100% only cares about getting paid
She recently was defending somebody in family court, Who had connections with one of her OLD clients. (July 2025 The greedy money hungry woman) left a voicemail to her old client  wanting to rush the process for the case she basically wanted money to start up a case) anyways fast forward 3 months later This silly woman defended her new client who had arguments and statements On why the old client is bad
My question is did she lie when she defended the old client during his court cases? Or was she lying recently with her new client. ?
Again, I have transcripts of Carolyn Markowitz Defending old client and speaking of him in a good light.
But as soon as somebody completely different comes into her office with some money , WHO she shouldn’t even have represented Because of the connection she has with the old client She throws all old client paperwork away again, it was 100% unethical at her part to even accept a new client as soon as she started hearing his claims She should’ve connected the dots and realized he was an old client of hers And before all this even happened, we 100% was looking forward to hiring her again.
She doesn’t know your name, she will not know your children’s name, she is 100% unprofessional. It doesn’t matter if you have a scheduled appointment she will not take the time to read your case or your name or your child’s name until you’re sitting in front of her.
She accepts and takes too many cases, and it just bombards her brain.
She comes to court late, she comes to court unprepared,
I 100% will not let this go maybe may start a protest here in the next couple of weeks or months, but this will not be forgotten.
Don’t speak or disrespect my character just for some money my integrity is not for sale! Even if you think this blows over, I will be there blowing it back up
Don’t waste your time or money
Lack of experience in family law, unresponsive for clients with poor communications skills
Very disappointed

Carolyn Markowitz was my lawyer and she did not communicate with me before hearings. She cost me to lose my case because she was being cocky. Instead of putting the child support hearing on hold until custody was established she just did whatever and did not act in my son's best interest or mine.  I wouldn't recommend this lawyer to anyone. My aunt spoke highly of her father, wish I could say the same for his daughter. Worst lawyer I ever encountered I was better off fighting my own case instead if wasting money for an incompetent,  non communicating lawyer.
Mr Markowitz handled my divorce 1978,my father divorce in 1981 Mr Jimmie Carter and now my niece Stephanie Redmond. I will send all family and friends to your law firm. Thanks 🙏
Good representation @ a good rate

I’m so glad Carolyn was recommended to me. She always returned my emails and my phone calls and got more than I expected in my settlement.  I don’t work on Friday, so a lot of communication was done on Fridays and she went above and beyond to meet my needs!  I’ve already recommended Carolyn to a couple of my friends!  I can’t thank you enough Carolyn for getting what was important to me.

Had a terrible experience with them. Showed up to court multiple times unprepared and with out provided documentation that was provided to them for proof of payment for child support. Put my family in a bad situation financially where the renewal of my Uncles (US Citizen) passport was dependent on the resolving of this issue and it was needed for him to keep his job. Now him and his wife and 3 kids are about to be out of a home and a job in a foreign country due to this Firms incapability to show up prepared for their job. They also failed to get the witness to testify to receiving the payments mentioned. Would highly recommend to stay away from this unprofessional place of practice. Will be filling a complaint with the BBB and State Bar Association.

I highly and strongly do not recommend, and my reasoning for this is because, any motion that was filed I could have did myself. The communication is absolutely horrible and I see that with other reviews as well! We pay hard earned money for things that we can do ourselves. You just have to read and do your research, unless your situation is critical! It was embarrassing that a judge is stating that my
Lawyer did not file an appearance in court, we were supposed to be there in person  but she insisted it was on zoom. I had to enforce what she should have said for me! This will be the last time. If you are not dealing with a criminal matter go to wherever you have to file a motion and ask. Plain and simple! Educate yourself.

This was the worst experience of my life she quoted me a fee of 1500 for a change of custody case and then because the case went longer then expected she charged me an additional 1,500 for doing absolutely nothing on my behalf. She said very little in court and she was repeating things that wasn't true and it was just one big mess. After a year my daughter is still in the same situation she was before highering this lady. Smh I do not recommend her at all!!!
Great law firm

Carolyn & her father represented my brother back in 2008 and did an excellent job! He won full custody and kept all his retirement/pensions. I just hired Carolyn to represent me and I’m excited to work with her or her father. They go by the law and enforce it.
Carol gets the job done. Period.

I’ve had a great experience with Carolyn as my attorney during my family custody case. I’m shocked to see so many negative reviews. She’s been quick to respond to all my emails and phone calls, has billed me very fairly, has been patient while I’ve paid off what I owe, whenever I need to talk even for just five minutes she always makes time to speak with me. I’ve had great success in my case having her represent me, I’m satisfied with the outcome of everything, and having to go through all of this during a pandemic (everything has been incredibly slow) she has kept great communication and has been in the loop for everything. I couldn’t have found a better person to represent me I’m so thankful. Highly recommend Carolyn, she’s always had my best interest at heart, and has fought for me the whole way.

She did the same thing to me as Brian Ellison. I cut her from my team quick before it got to his amount. I paid a deposit she only went to court one time & pisssed the judge off instead of helping me. She didn't return a lot of my calls then made it look like I was not following the judges orders fast enough. Then I asked her for a detailed bill and that's when she told me that she would need more money to keep representing me. So $2800 for one meeting & one court date where she was unprepared & got me in trouble with the judge! She never gave me a detailed bill for any services before, during or after service . I have never had any attorney, never give me a detailed bill. I want my one star above back also. 0 stars! This experience with her scared me to death in court!

I hired her for a divorce and subsequent post judgment custody issues. After contracting her for a $3,500 divorce, I ended up paying over $12,000 and have absolutely nothing to show for it.
At first I thought she was simply too busy to provide quality representation, but as time went on I saw more hints of her incompetence and dishonesty.
She would never give me receipts or provide me with copies of documents she had filed, despite multiple requests.
I paid her by the motion for several different actions. When she failed to file a response for me and there was no hearing on a motion I paid her for, she refused to return my money and tried to tell me she was working on my case on overtime with a standard hourly rate of $300. Over the course of 2 years there was never an hourly rate discussed, nor was it in the signed agreement.
In the end, I'm worse off after having hired Ms. Markowitz. I highly recommend against anyone doing the same.

I want to start by saying I live in CT and my daughter has lived in MI with my ex since we split in 2009. For almost the past 2 years Carolyn has been fighting for me for custody of my daughter and not once did I feel that she was running me through the ringer for a pay check. She genuinely cares and it shows. The best part is we just won!!!!!!!! My daughter is now living with me in CT. If you are contemplating hiring her just do it. She is the best hands down.

Carolyn is amazing at assisting me get what is best for my children.  my ex constantly drags me into court for the dumbest reasons, Carolyn is extremely fair with billing.  I would highly recommend Carolyn to any guy going through a family court situation.
Carolyn has been a great Blessing! She gets the job done, no nonsense. Cuts through the crap. If your a woman in Divorce, SAHM especially, I highly recommend her!!
Highly Lacking in communication skills, and Very unprofessional. Will not use or recommend again.
Started off better than it ended very unprofessional will never use again
Love Carolyn and the whole firm, very professional and smart, I had a great experience! I would definitely recommend them!

Unsat, Unprofessional, Unethical and Immoral.....
Ex-wife hired this guy as her attorney years ago, however he was no match for my attorney. In addition, as a law student saw him in court while on classroom court assignments and I wonder why is he still able to practice law.  He's a disgrace to the craft of law...
Absolutely the best and most honorable  extremely intelligent attorney in know. Mr.cohen goes above and beyond for his clients it's really a blessing to know him

Andrea Ham is my work comp lawyer in Michigian @ MILLER & Cohen
She won my case & has helped many UAW workers of General Motors and Ford.
I referred many of my other UAW friends to her .
I reside in Tennessee know & still refer her clients .

My experience with Andrew Cohen during a case against an insurance company clearly at fault, I had called several attorneys such as David Feminnineo, Bernstein office, that little guy that lives with his mom Mike Morse. None of these attorneys would take my case because to them a $6000 settlement isn’t worth their time. Then I had a friend put me in contact with Andrew Cohen, not only did he offer to help me, he went above and beyond to field my calls, see me in his office, help with paperwork, give great advice and pick me up when I wanted to give up. He’s not just a great attorney that knows the laws, he’s personable with people and will go the extra mile for the underdog such as in my case. I would recommend Andrew Cohen to anyone in need of a exemplary attorney. Thank you Andrew for all your hard work to keep me focused and assisting me in winning my case.
They are friendly,helpful and actually take the time to talk to you instead of making you feel like you have to rush and get through stuff.
The food came the plates we're hot but the mac and cheese was very cold I had to reject it and it was not replaced. Service left a little to be desired.

Marc and Josie are amazing! Always available to answer questions and keep you in the loop. I was fighting for my freedom against along list of gun charges that totaled decades in prison. Marc listened to my story and figured out how to proceed with my case. Needless to say, all charges were thrown out and im a free man once again. Can't speak highly enough about this man! If your in doubt, dont be. He is simply amazing at what he does and he has all kinds of awards to prove his greatness. Thank god for this man!

Marc is a well known and respected attorney in MI.  He is a former prosecutor and has been a defense attorney for a long time. He is well known in various district courts. He charges reasonable, competitive price for his services. He has represented me for three different misdemeanor cases. All off my cases turned out better than I expected thanks to Marc representing me. I regret the criminal charges I got but never regretted my decision to hire Marc Hart! Hire Marc,  you won't regret it either!!

I Am A Special Needs Client Who Currently Has Been Being Helped By Marc. Marc Hart Is The Best Attorney In Michigan He’s Very Caring Compassionate And Professional. Josie Is The Nicest Secretary Ever. I Highly Recommend

This is an excellent ATTORNEY he represented my brother Glen last year on a drug and gun charge and Mr.Hart got him a year probation. And he is currently representing him now with another case. He always answers calls and even called my dad from the hospital bed. Get well Attorney Hart we need you.
My Attorney Marc Hart was incredibly honest, Transparent, and always had my best interest at heart. The outcome of my case was very favorable, and I couldn't be happier with their service.!

reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Asai, I don't know you, have never met you, and never represented you. I don't know who you are so mad at but it could not be me.  Please take down your review.

reviews.text: Mr Hart, Was Never on time,bad communication didn’t really make a defense on my behalf I had to basically defend myself on both of my cases wrote letters to both of my judges just to get a minimum sentence basically took my money and I still was incarcerated then didn’t not want to give me back any type of compensation because he knew deep down he didn’t do anything would not recommend if your not trying to got to jail

I had a court appointed lawyer at 1st that was offering me a 2 year probation drug court deal, for an accidental  gun shooting and I don't use drugs, I fired her and hired Marc Hart, today he just got me off with 3 months probation and nothing will be on my record, like it never happened. Marc kicked ass in court today, also Marc is a very nice guy who really cares about people, thank you Marc Hart for saving me, God Bless you and your family.

Attorney Marc Hart provided excellent service in defending me on an unexpected criminal charge. Mr. Hart and his Legal Assistant responded promptly and professionally to my questions and requirements. Marc demonstrates the highest level of integrity.
My experience with Atty. Marc Hart was excellent! I am overly impressed with the turn out of my case. Josie was also very diligent, I really appreciate this team! Thank You for your hard work.

Marc,
My family would like to thank you. We came to you with some serious charges against a family member. I (as a mother) was scared to death. Not knowing anything about the law or what to do. reviews.text: This man is very rude , an not helpful because I'm not a criminal smdh I rudely got talked over an hung up on!!!!!

I have no words to express how professional and amazing this attorney really is! He exceeded my expectations in every way! I am so very thankful I ran into him and I will forever keep him as my attorney. I highly recommend him to everyone. His experience is unmatched! He is too good to be true. My previous lawyer gave me the worst experience ever because he did not show up to my hearings, refused to return my calls for weeks, and did not want to give me a refund. He communicates very well and lets you know what to expect ahead of time. I literally do not know how to show him my gratitude! He got my charge dropped significantly. He listens to you and gives the best advice as well. Thank you and thank you again Mr. Hart! You are an amazing person and super amazing at your work!! Please do not hesitate to give him a call. He will NOT disappoint. I look forward to working with him in the future.

If you’re looking for the best defense attorney in Michigan, look no further.  Marc Hart is top-tier at what he does. Not only is he one of Michigans top ten attorneys, but he represents his clients to the fullest. You’re not just a docket number to him.  His professionalism and knowledge to the law is untouchable. He was thorough, honest, and extremely informative. I was beyond happy with the final outcome of my case. There is no denying,  if you want the best of the best, and an attorney with PROVEN success, you want Marc Hart.

Best Lawyer in Metro Detroit,and Oakland County. He’s a great trial, lawyer, and he fights for you from his true heart. Understanding and fair. If you want to win higher, Mark, I promise you he will give you the best defense anyone can ask for.

Marc was pleasant to consult with but unprofessional from there on out. He was often unaware of the details of my case.
He was 30 minutes late for the pretrial and over 1 hour late for the 8:30 am scheduled trial because he had another court appointment. I confirmed the date/time with him two days prior and the night before, and he never mentioned a conflict. I gave him $2,000 for extra stress and to stand next to me and say “move to dismiss”. I would not recommend. Find someone that values your time and has more respect.

Mr. Hart has been my attorney for years. Mr. Hart is excellent at what he does. He is very knowledgeable,professional,caring guy, he is always there if his clients need him. It seems there are very negative reviews of people that haven't actually used Steve Lehto. They write defamatory things here in google reviews.  Just so those doing that understand that is LIBEL and can be prosecuted in court. Not liking a person is one thing. To publicly defame a person writing it online to hurt them financially is a criminal offense.

Libel definition
The legally indefensible publication or broadcast of words or images that are degrading to a person or injurious to his or her reputation.

Penalties for criminal defamation in those states may include fines, restitution, public service, and perhaps jail time. By far, libel and slander are considered to be civil tortes, allowing for a victim to file a civil lawsuit requesting damages. Remedies for libel may include injunctive relief, as well as monetary

I contacted Levy & Associates with a property tax question.  Initially, I was told that they don't handle property tax issues and thought that that was the end of it.

After a few hours passed, a senior manager at the firm reached out to me and asked me to explain my situation and he would see if they could help.  I called and explained my situation, which included both a federal income tax issue and a potential property tax issue.

Lance, the Chief Operating Officer that took my call, was absolutely great--very professional, sympathetic to my situation and willing to do what he could to help address my issues.  Top notch.

After listening to my questions, he called on an expert in his office to address my federal income tax question.  That question was answered promptly.  At the time of this writing, he is working to find a resource to address the property tax questions that I have.

This company is looking to help the clients that they serve.  Lance went above and beyond what I expected in working to address the very specific and unique needs that I had regarding my tax issues.  I will return to Levy and Associates for my future tax needs.

reviews.text:
I'm only giving them 3 stars because of a couple of issues. First off, I won my SSDI case after it was denied the first time, and it went to reconsideration, which after 2 long years of being homeless, and losing everything, what a blessing it was knowing I won.
This is where Nyman Turkish earned the 3 stars, instead of 5 stars. I was told by Mary my case manager that my local Social Security office wanted to speak with me and they were going to call me, which they did. I was told by the S.S. rep that I was approved for SSDI, but not SSI, and the reasons which he explained. I was ecstatic to say the least, and the S.S. rep said he was surprised my attorney didn't tell me that I won my case, which was upsetting, because I would have thought they would have congratulated me on winning, and explain how the back pay works, when I would see it, and when regular payments would start. That was on 12/15/25, no call or email from them, again little upsetting. So I called the local office, they tell me I have to go into the office and request my back pay be released, which I did, then find out my attorneys already got paid 12/19/25, and still no correspondence to say congratulations or a simple Thank You for choosing them to represent me.
It's pretty sad that they were close to being fired by myself because of their incompetence, and unprofessionalism with my previous case manager and team, and they reached out and asked for a second chance, which I gave them, only to just get paid, (which they didn't do a lot of hard work) and say nothing! I get it, they were retained to provide a service, but have the decency to say Thank You, and show that you care and are grateful, instead of nothing, didn't all of your parents raise you better than that, DO BETTER, SHOW SOME GRATITUDE! So, if you're looking for a law firm that say they care, and you chose Nyman Turkish, just be prepared for them to just take the money and run!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are glad you were able to connect with our Director of Quality Assurance on this matter and pleased that you were approved for Social Security Disability benefits. We take pride in helping thousands of clients receive Social Security benefits every year. We are dedicated to maintaining high standards of client satisfaction and remain available for any further assistance. Please don’t hesitate to reach out to us. Warm Regards, The Nyman Turkish Team.

reviews.text:
If you think you don't need a lawyer for SSDI, you're wrong -- you absolutely do. I'm a seasoned government professional with over 30 years of experience managing complex grants and navigating bureaucracy, and even I couldn't have done this alone. The SSDI process is far more complicated than it appears. It's not just about pain or daily limitations; it's about whether you can perform any substantial work. The rules are technical, often subjective, and the system is designed to deny most claims.

I first hired another attorney, but they were hard to reach and often inaccurate in their handling of my information. I ended up retracting my initial application, delaying everything. Then I found Nyman Turkish LLP, and the difference was immediate and remarkable.

From the beginning, they were attentive, professional, and genuinely kind. When they didn't understand something, they asked -- and they always listened carefully. Messages were returned promptly, usually within a day or two. The entire team was supportive and realistic, never over-promising or inflating expectations. That honesty mattered, because so much of this process depends on factors outside your control -- like who reviews your file or which judge you get.

My attorney, Jessica Turkish, was exceptional. She had clearly read and understood every detail of my file. She was direct but compassionate, patient but precise, and she knew exactly how to prepare me for the hearing. She told me frankly where my case was strong and where it needed reinforcement. During the hearing itself, her questioning was so thorough and strategic that the judge didn't need to ask me a single thing. We received a fair, partially favorable ruling, and I finally felt relief after years of financial and medical stress.

I have very high standards for professionalism and customer service, and I don't give praise lightly. Nyman Turkish met and exceeded every expectation. If you're applying for SSDI, I can say without hesitation: hire them. You'll be in capable, compassionate, and truly expert hands.

I am THRILLED with the service I received here! I worked with Cliff and he was amazing. I was denied disability when I filed on my own, so I reached out to him based on his reviews and website, and I’m so glad I did.
He immediately filed a “reconsideration”, which I didn’t even know was an option (I thought the only option was to appeal). This sped up the process and literally 8 weeks later my case was approved for disability. I never had to talk to anyone else from social security or see a judge or anything, Cliff took care of all the paperwork and all I had to do was fill out a few basic, standard papers at the beginning.  When one of my doctors refused to sign any paperwork, they assured me it was okay and proceeded without it anyways.
Staff is friendly and helpful, and Cliff is supportive and truly listens and is always available to talk to you. It was worth the money to get my decision so quickly and effortlessly!

reviews.ownerResponse:
We do not do Friend of the Court cases. We handle Federal Social Security claims, not State FOC.
Your application was submitted to Social Security Administration 5/18/22. There is nothing to itemize for a bill. The Attorney fee is on contingency that the claim is approved. Yes, we asked for you medical and work history as is required for any successful claim. All the work is required to come from you since you are the claimant. SSA's questions must be answered by the claimant. Work Activities and Daily Activities are to come from you, the claimant

reviews.text: Unfortunately, this was the worst legal experience I have ever had. I have worked with the best firms and decided to try a smaller firm. I retained Morgan for my family law matter. She lacked the confidence, maturity, and aggressiveness that I wanted. I explicitly explained that my ex would not come prepared & this would be an easy case. I could have done this on my own but Hired counsel so I didn’t have to deal with him. He didn’t come prepared. It doesn’t get much easier than that. Morgan was passive aggressive-she told me about “issues” only after I had voiced mine first regarding her representation after reflecting on it. She initially told me she thought the hearing went “great” and after I voiced concerns she told me “my talking and interrupting hurt our argument” when I already won 2/3. That’s passive aggressive. Isn’t that something I should be told, as a paying client, after the hearing when we spoke and not coming on the heels of my email expressing discontent?  She said a whole five words during an hour zoom meeting and I kept emailing her during the zoom telling her to bring this up. She even put the blame on me for getting the days mixed up of our hearing when I sent the zoom Info and she didn’t read it. The email heading even said “see you in a few”. It’s not the clients job to keep track of an attorneys agenda. Read documents that your clients send you to double check. I’m not paying to be a secretary when I have active representation. I even provided “work product” to Morgan that came from my previously $550/hr counsel to use.  She billed me for emails sent during the zoom call (even ones where the referee was asking me to contact her) which I was already billed for the zoom call and billed for emails that she read but never responded to. I tried to bring this up to the Daniel and no response. If you want excellent representation go with a larger firm with a well known attorney. I only went with this firm because my case was so easy, I didn’t want to do the talking but wanted my voice to be heard through my attorney. I wrote her a long opening since the other side gets to talk and she said “it was helpful” but again after paragraph and paragraph of info, she only said “mom pays for camp and school”?!  That’s it. I wanted my ex to be held accountable for a frivolous motion. You pay for what you get with representation! You can’t buy confidence or experience. A newer attorney lacks the skill.This is more disturbing. She even suggested in the beginning that we should have a “male” counselor meet with my ex because “it didn’t sound like my ex respected women” and she thought having another male attorney would be helpful in gaining respect from my ex. She should demand respect and not need a “prop” to obtain results.RED FLAG That’s the difference.She wanted to have me pay another attorney from the firm that was a male (she recommended Daniel) to have a meeting with me and my ex. Women are still oppressed because of that mentality. We don’t need a man to demand respect towards women. We don’t ask for respect, we demand it. It helps to have an attorney that is friendly with the judge or has a relationship with but not hire a male to demand respect from another man. Take this as review as you want but I’d never recommend them. They don’t call back/follow up when you voice concerns.This was someone else’s concern in the comments. They are responsive up until that point but doesn’t instill trust in client/attorney relationship.I contacted Daniel and he told me if I wanted to discuss the matter than to let him know.I sent several emails & a phone call. Nothing. Don’t waste your time; and coming from someone that has worked with the best civil rights attorney (Deb Gordon), family law (Honigman), and business matters (Jaffe). Pay the extra $200 an hour and get someone that is connected in the field and has confidence in themselves and their capability. It’s a night and day experience. You only get one shot in court and we all want to feel like we are vindicated and your counsel is able and competent to fight for you.

reviews.text:
I am Attorney Cynthia M. Lindsey and I have been a practicing lawyer for over 37 years in the State of Michigan and Nationwide. I consider myself competent, talented, self-assured, and willing to go the extra mile for my clients.

I was contacted by My Goddaughter, who was looking to have an attorney as competent, talented, self-assured, and willing to go to the extra mile like me to represent her in a potentially acrimonious Divorce which could have international ramifications.

My Goddaughter is very much aware that I have handled many high profile and complicated Divorce matters myself over my years however, she also knew that I would not be willing to do represent her because I did not want any potential conflict of interest and because I thought it would be best if she had a neutral Attorney to represent her.

So I sought out to find a reputable, competent, reliable, trustworthy attorney to represent her and in doing so I called upon another very good friend of mine, a Judge that I have the upmost respect and trust in for a recommendation fans since the Judge knows my reputation as a competent, smart, tenacious attorney, she knew to only recommend an Attorney with similar skills, expertise, knowledge and tenacity as myself and she was referred me to Attorney , Kendell Lott-Tucker.

Yesterday, Wednesday, March 6, 2024, I called Attorney Lucker, to vet her for myself before referring her to manage the Divorce proceedings for My Goddaughter. I found her to be amazingly easy to talk to; she very gratuitously listened to me explain my interest is seeking her out and she certainly sounded very competent. I was subsequently able to arrange a three-way conversation between Attorney Lott-Tucker and My Goddaughter, where I listened to her explain to My Goddaughter all the pros, cons and pitfalls that could happen during a Divorce with international ramifications.

I listened in awe, and I must say both My Goddaughter and I were extremely impressed with the competence, the knowledge and the skills exhibited during the conversation with Attorney Lott-Tucker.

I am about to retire, and I need to know that when people call me about Family Law, Estate Planning, and Probate matters, that I can refer them to an Attorney, whom I have personally vetted myself, and whom I believe to be as competent, affable, skilled as myself. Based upon my interaction with Attorney Kendell Lott- Tucker, I would have no hesitation referring people to her for legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Attorney Lindsey for your kind words. I consider a referral to be the highest form of compliment and endorsement. You have  an outstanding record and are doing incredible work now as a fierce public justice advocate. I am grateful to have met you during Women's History Month and to be able to look to you as a great legal resource. I wish you all the best.

reviews.text:
Kendell Lott-Tucker went through the fire with me starting in 2015 during my divorce. It was final in 2016, and I thought we were finished. In June 2020, I was getting my finances in order, so I reached out to Kendell to get my name off the marital home. Retaliation came with that decision, and the fight was on. My ex-husband filed for full custody of our youngest daughter. During my times of despair, she encouraged me to keep persevering. We had conversations before, after, and in between court hearings. Kendell was a prayer warrior, and even when I became frustrated and a little cantankerous, she listened, gave positive words of affirmation, and sound legal advice. She was my voice when I did not have a voice, my ears when I couldn’t hear clearly, and when I pushed back and yelled, she understood my reasoning and yielded to my needs and desires. It has been a long and treacherous two-year child custody rollercoaster journey, but God, we have the victory! My child and I are striving and thriving emotionally, socially, and academically! The major storm has passed, and we’re ready for upcoming battles. I recommend that Kendell Lott-Tucker represent you as your attorney in a divorce or child custody battle!

~Jennifer M.

Parisa got my DV case dismissed. She is different from other attorneys. She doesn’t interrupt me and patiently listens to my concerns first. She gives a calm, confident, and ruthless impression, which is why I retained her after talking to so many attorneys. She emails me quickly about every step and detail of my case, such as motions/deviations she’s filing or evidence she receives. Some attorneys are not this detail-oriented.
Additionally, she confirms your professional status, like your medical license and your immigration status, to ensure that the result won’t negatively affect you. She is patient with her clients but very effective and ruthless in court. She isn't afraid to go to trial if needed. While she and her firm can be very expensive, you want to retain a very competent attorney, especially when you are concerned about your career or immigration status.
You don’t want to retain a random or “affordable” attorney because it will be a nightmare. For me, I am a very picky person and want my attorney to be effective and aggressive in court. Parisa and her firm will do everything possible to obtain a dismissal or a not-guilty verdict. She is not a random attorney who would convince you to accept a lame plea deal. We spoke to several lawyers about my dad’s case before finding Nick, and all of them said my dad would either have to take a plea deal or serve days in jail for his charge. None of them mentioned any other options Nick didn’t guarantee anything but told us he would try his hardest to get the best outcome — and he did, he got the entire case dismissed.
We contacted Nick wanting to hire him, and he met with us in his office the very next day.  He was able to speak with us gather all information and lay out all options. From my dad’s experience dealing with criminal defense attorneys over the years, Nick was one of the few whose incredible knowledge of the law and amazing skills really stood out. He wasn’t just confident — he knew exactly how to handle the case and get results.
He knew exactly how to negotiate an amazing bond and handle the situation efficiently.
One of the things that stood out the most was his constant communication — quick, clear, and efficient. Whether email or phone he was able available. He kept us updated, answered every question, and made sure we understood everything along the way.
Given my dad’s record and the judge and prosecutor involved, we went in thinking jail time was almost guaranteed. Once Nick stepped in everything changed. He even was able to help my dad know the next steps he should take after.
If you want someone who’s incredibly knowledgeable, determined, truly skilled, and protects their clients while delivering real actual, unmatched results, hire Nick. We’re beyond grateful for everything he did for our dad.

reviews.text: Whenever a person is hurt or injured it’s never a good time and it is a company by many hardships. At the end of day PLAINTIFF FUNDING has been the saving grace to keep myself in my family alive during these trying times. They have been there standing in the financial gaps, helping me provide my basic essentials whether it’s putting food on the table paying the mortgage payment plan to funds have helped me with all my needs during this rough times, I would also like to mention there is a special young lady who no matter what she always delivers News with the highest level of professionalism and helps walk you through the entire process. Bree is just utterly amazing and she is a true representation of the excellent care that you will get when you use plaintiff funding .

reviews.text:
I was facing 18 points on my license across 3 different misdemeanors. That's a potential 3-12 month suspension, and I was terrified. I hired Julian Poota and he met me at the jail that same night within 2 hours. He got everything thrown out and walked away with just 2 tickets — 2 points total. Once I finish a driver education program I'll be at zero. No probation, no restitution, and the fines are nothing compared to what I was looking at.

I thought if things went really well I'd come out with 10 points. He got me to zero. The way he handled things with the prosecutor made it clear he knew exactly what he was doing.

The only possible complaint I can even think of is his Zoom invite message had a meeting ID number instead of a direct link. He saved my license and a ton of money so I think I can manage the five extra seconds it takes to type it in.

I can't recommend him enough. He blew my expectations away.
Julian was wonderful. I would recommend him to anyone; very personable, helpful, easy to communicate with. Thank you sincerely , Julian, for your assistance. My son Josh & I appreciate you very much.

reviews.text:
I am incredibly grateful for the guidance and support I have received from this lawyer named Thea and her team. From the very beginning, she took the time to explain the process clearly, answered every question with patience, and made sure I understood  my options at each step.

Navigating the legal system can feel overwhelming, but they broke everything down in a way that made it manageable and far less intimidating.

What truly stood out was their professionalism paired with genuine compassion. They were the 3rd firm I called, closing in on dates, that made it more frustrating, in the beginning, when you have many roads to take and no map to tell you which way is the right way.

I will be honest here. Thea has FIRE inside her, her personality along with her knowledge to fight for my deposition, was clear from the first phone call conversation, and she was real with me. I believe whole heartedly that if a lawyer doesn’t swear about what’s happening. Even just a little, off the stand. They probably worry more about lining their pocket, than the actual situation at hand. That’s true compassion.

I don’t want to be persuaded with sweet dreams. I want the hard reality, and ugly truth. She gave me that, and never sugar coated anything.

They didn’t treat me like just another case, they treated like a person, that mattered. Their knowledge of the system, attention to detail, and ability to anticipate challenges gave me more confidence during a very stressful time in my life.

Thanks to her guidance, I always felt informed, prepared, and supported. I would absolutely recommend this company, and Thea to anyone looking for someone who is not only highly skilled, but also truly invested in helping their clients through the process with clarity and care.

This was a matter at hand, that could have ruined my life. Or set me back 4 years in prison. To a resolution of being dismissed in the end. It was worth every penny, from start to finish!

Thank you Thea and Elimitix PLLC!

reviews.text: Overall, my experience with this firm was mixed. I will say, first, that the owners of this firm are fully dedicated to positive experiences for their clients. They reached out to me regarding my attorney's shortcomings during my case and worked hard to make it right, even considering the case's favorable outcome and no "real" obligation to do so. Learn from my experience: your attorney is your advocate in the courtroom, but you need to be your own advocate in the law firm. It seems like you'd easily find someone willing to listen and help, even if you need to ask to speak to someone "higher up". Attorney Dubin handled my case for $3k and attended two virtual pre-trial conferences. Communication throughout the ordeal was minimal (though it may have been a system error for the automated messages) and I was left in the dark for almost the entire week leading up to my first conference until I reached out to my attorney directly the evening before. I also had to go search court records myself to find out the details of the final outcome aside from "all set!". That being said, despite the distress of the unknown (among everything else happening) during the proceedings, everything went as smoothly as could be expected.

reviews.text: There is not a whole lot worse than having  your career and your life screeching to a halt due to an injury. I truly cannot give them enough stars.

My son did some stupid stuff when he was sixteen but when he got caught he had turn already turned seventeen. I was talking about it with some friends cause their son had something life changing happen, and they recommend Seymour. They told me he's great at law and was very straight to the point. Now keep in mind that I'm not rich by any means and the friends that I was talking to weren't rich but pretty well off. So I called Seymour and left a message on a Friday afternoon around 4pm thinking that he would get back to me on monday. He called me back that evening around 8pm. We then set up a time to meet on that Sunday. I live in Monroe and he lives up past 696. He drove to Monroe on that Sunday to meet me without expecting one dollar. We sat in a truck stop going over everything for a hour and a half. When we did get to the money part of the discussion, he wasn't the cheapest law that I had spoke with but he was that cared the most. Also he gave me all the scenarios of what could happen. The other attorneys basically just told me what was going to happen.  He has a great relationship with the prosecutors and judges. When I was in court I could tell he was respected by his peers. His people skills are phenomenal and he is not scared to speak up for you if it's sometime that you and him don't agree with. I gave him a 5 stars because of his integrity and the extra mile he went for my son and the folks I got the referral from.

These guys are amazing I couldn’t be happier with all the work and effort they put into my case always kept me updated and I was kinda  bug  but always got a reply anyone would be happy with there work

reviews.text:
Isa is a wonderful lawyer who cares about his clients. Isa knows what he is doing, always calls you back, and even checks up on you to see how you are doing/feeling. How many lawyer's out there actually check up on their clients well-being? Honestly, not many! His staff is amazing, respectful, super friendly, compassionate, and extremely helpful. I highly recommend this law firm to ANYONE looking for a lawyer that truly cares.

UPDATE:
During my entire time here, Michael and Larry took over and fulfilled any and all needs pertaining to my car accident caused by an uninsured drunk driver. The fact these two men fought on my behalf without ever backing down, taking no for an answer, and standing up to my own insurance company who tried to screw me over…speaks volumes. They got me medical for life and I cannot thank them enough for always being there for me, especially when I needed them the most. Anytime I ever have an issue, they made sure to step right back up to the plate and handle it with grace and in a timely manner. I will always have nothing but endless respect, gratitude, love, and appreciation for everyone at this law firm. They all work together as a team and make sure the best interest is in the client. They always return phone calls, emails, take care of the medical bills, handle the harassment of medical debt collectors, ensure you’re getting the best medical care from doctors, explain everything to you so you can understand every step of the way what is going on and what will be happening with your case as it moves forward, and tell you up front that “all you need to focus on is healing and getting better…we will do the rest.”
I seriously cannot stress enough how phenomenal this law firm is and how hard they work for their clients. They are not money driven by any means, they are justice driven and fight for what’s right. Thank you all so much for everything you have done and continue to do for me. You guys are the real rock stars of lawyers and deserve so much more recognition then you get.
